caribbean.headline: Caribbean Conditions: Freeport
caribbean.paragraph: Freeport in the Bahamas is the highest-impact location in the Caribbean this period, with winds peaking at 22 kt and seas building to 3.7 ft with ESE swell at 7s periods. 75% rain probability -- expect disrupted conditions for shore excursions and tender operations.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Conditions: Dubrovnik
mediterranean.paragraph: Dubrovnik in the Central Mediterranean is the highest-impact location in the Mediterranean this period, with winds peaking at 17 kt and seas building to 4.3 ft with W swell at 5s periods. 75% rain probability -- expect disrupted conditions for shore excursions and tender operations.
